title: Yuru Camp RM Songpack
description: A Reactive Music Mod songpack that plays Yuru Camp OSTs in-game. The Reactive Music mod is required for the resource pack to work.
body:
**The [Reactive Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music) mod is required for this resource pack to work.**

This resource pack includes music from the Yuru Camp series and it changes based on time, weather, and dimension. For Yuru Camp lovers and cozy music!

**Installation:**

1. Drag-and-drop the downloaded songpack.zip (YuruPack.zip) into the resourcepacks folder.
2. In-game, navigate to the Mods menu and search for the Reactive Music mod
3. Select the "_Configure..._" button in the top right and load the pack.
